name: Vortex Brands Co.
summary: Vortex Brands Co., doing business as Vortex Green Energy, provides Phase Angle Synchronization (PAS) equipment to electric utilities in California. PAS captures the unusable electricity before it travels back to the utility and recycles it to be usable again to the end-user. It is also developing the tracking and auditing protocols for the environmental impact of PAS systems. The company is based in Sacramento, California.
